sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85011" key="polu/kwmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-κωμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85011.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much-revelling,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.17</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacrcont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
